zh.lifeSummary: 當Agatha de Kyrton於1287年出生在英國肯特時，她的父親Sir Roger Kryton26歲，母親Alicia de Thweng20歲。她於大約1309年與Sir Richard Molyneux在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1361年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agatha de Kyrton于1287年出生在英国肯特时，她的父亲Sir Roger Kryton26岁，母亲Alicia de Thweng20岁。她于大约1309年与Sir Richard Molyneux在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1361年在英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kyrton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Kirton (Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, Suffolk), or Kirton in Lindsey (Lincolnshire). The placenames derive from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ (probably replacing Old English cirice ‘church’) + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Agatha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Agnes   and   Agatha .

variants.name: Agnes
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agatha de Kyrton was born in 1287, in Kent, England, her father, Sir Roger Kryton, was 26 and her mother, Alicia de Thweng, was 20. She married Sir Richard Molyneux about 1309, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1361, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agatha de Kyrton est née en 1287, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Kryton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alicia de Thweng, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Molyneux environ 1309, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1361, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agatha de Kyrton 1287 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Roger Kryton 26 und ihre Mutter Alicia de Thweng 20. Sie hat um 1309 in Lancashire, England Sir Richard Molyneux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1361 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha de Kyrton è nata il nel 1287 nel Kent, England, sua padre, Sir Roger Kryton, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alicia de Thweng, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Molyneux circa 1309, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1361, nel Sefton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agatha de Kyrtonが1287年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Krytonは26歳，母Alicia de Thwengは20歳であった。約1309年にイギリスランカシュアイアでSir Richard Molyneuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1361年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agatha de Kyrton(이)가 1287년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Roger Kryton(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alicia de Thweng(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1309년 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir Richard Molyneux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agatha de Kyrton nasceu em 1287, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Kryton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alicia de Thweng, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Molyneux aproximadamente 1309, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1361, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agatha de Kyrton родилась в 1287 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Roger Kryton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alicia de Thweng, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Molyneux около 1309 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1361 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agatha de Kyrton nació en 1287, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Kryton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alicia de Thweng, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Molyneux aproximadamente 1309, en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1361, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años.
